popularStory.headline: My Maternal 15th. Great Grandfather, Lachlan Og MacLean, 8th. Chief of Clan MacLean, 4th. Laird of Duart
popularStory.description:
Name: Lachlan Og MacLean, 8th. Chief of Clan MacLean, 4th. Laird of Duart
Born: 1432 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland
Married: 1454 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland to Catherine Campbell Of Argyll …

associatedMedia.headline: Cowthally Castle, Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
Cowthally Castle, view of a ruined overgrown castle with remnants of a round tower to the left, on a hill-top with a stream running into the foreground to right, a spire among trees in the distance to right and mountains in the background; illustration to Scott's edition of Somerville's 'Memorie of the Somervilles ...'. 1815
Print made by: Richard Rhodes

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose於1434年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞時，她的父親Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell22歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Somerville21歲。她於1454年與Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1516年11月18日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德享年82歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose于1434年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞时，她的父亲Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell22岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Somerville21岁。她于1454年与Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1516年11月18日在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德享年82岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Camble
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campbel
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Cambell
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose was born in 1434, in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, was 22 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, was 21. She married Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief in 1454, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 18 November 1516, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 82, and was buried in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose est née en 1434, à Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief en 1454, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 novembre 1516, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose 1434 in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Somerville 21. Sie hat 1454 in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. November 1516 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose è nata il nel 1434 nel Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief nel 1454, nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 novembre 1516, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montroseが1434年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアドラーで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbellは22歳，母Lady Elizabeth Somervilleは21歳であった。1454年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスでLachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chiefと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1516年11月18日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで82歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.-Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose(이)가 1434년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 돌라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Somerville(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1454년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 11월 18일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose nasceu em 1434, em Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Somerville, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief em 1454, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1516, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.-Duart Castle, Isle of Mull, Scotland: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose родилась в 1434 г. в местности доллар, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Archibald Campbell - Master of Campbell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Somerville, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief в 1454 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 ноября 1516 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief en 1454, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1516, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
